name: Cheesy Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 can (10 oz) Campbell's Cream of Mushroom Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onion in butter until translucent.
2. Add chicken breasts and cook until chicken is just done (juices run clear). Remove and set in a large baking dish.
3. In a large measuring cup, mix soup (10 oz can) and milk and stir to remove the lumps.
4. Pour mixture over chicken in baking dish.
5. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese and bake for 15 - 20 minutes at 325°F.
6. Saute mushrooms in butter until cooked through.
7. When chicken is removed from oven, spread sautéed mushrooms over top and serve.
8. Serve with mashed potatoes or rice. Excellent with cauliflower or broccoli as a side vegetable. The cheese sauce can be added to the vegetables for extra flavor.
